name: White Chocolate Devils
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Place baking rack in center of oven and line 12 muffin cups with paper liners.
In a medium bowl, sift together flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt. Gently whisk dry ingredients until blended; set aside.
In a heavy-duty electric mixer, beat butter with sugar at medium speed until thoroughly combined (about 2 minutes). Beat in egg and vanilla; scrape sides of bowl and beat for 1 minute until well blended.
Beat in melted chocolate. At low speed, gradually beat in buttermilk one-third at a time, alternating with dry ingredients. Mix just until combined, scraping sides of bowl as needed.
Divide batter among prepared muffin cups. Bake cupcakes for 25-30 minutes or until firm when lightly touched. Cool cupcakes in pan for 5 minutes before removing to wire rack; cool completely.
Making the white chocolate filling:
Place white chocolate in a stainless steel bowl. In a saucepan, bring heavy cream to gentle boil. Remove from heat and pour hot cream over chocolate. Let stand for 30 minutes to melt chocolate; whisk until smooth. Cover bowl and refrigerate until well chilled (at least 4 hours).
Using hand-held electric mixer, whip chilled white chocolate mixture until reaching consistency of sour cream. With a small knife, cut conical pieces (3/4 inch diameter) from center of each cupcake. Remove conical piece and bottom of cone, leaving round cap. Discard or eat the cone bottoms.
Fill pastry bag fitted with medium plain tip with white chocolate filling; pipe into each cupcake hole. Cover filled cupcakes with reserved caps. Place in airtight container and refrigerate while making glaze.
Dark Chocolate Glaze:
Place chocolate in food processor bowl fitted with metal blades. Process until finely ground (20-30 seconds). In small saucepan, bring cream and corn syrup to gentle boil. Keep motor running; pour hot mixture through feed tube onto chocolate. Process until smooth (about 10 seconds). Pour glaze into medium bowl; cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Remove cupcakes from refrigerator. Dip tops of each cupcake in glaze, allowing excess to drip off. Place cupcakes back in refrigerator for 10 minutes to set glaze. Re-dip tops of cupcakes in glaze. Set glazed cupcakes at room temperature before serving. Melt white chocolate in microwave (1/2 cup chopped in microwave-safe container; microwave at medium for 1-4 minutes until shiny). Remove from microwave and stir until completely melted (about 1-1/2 minutes). Fill pastry bag with melted chocolate and drizzle in zigzag pattern over glazed cupcakes. Chill before serving.
